summary: Fixed public-library review findings in list filtering and shared keyword scoring.
reason: Greptile review on the publish PR found list-name filtering, difficulty scoring, consensus counting, and title-casing defects in eRank-specific novel commands.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli -run 'Test(NovelListsOptimize|KeywordListID|FilterKeywordTermRows|ScoreKeyword|RankConsensusTags|BuildAngles)' and go test ./... pass.
